scripts.check:cloudflare-tools: node --check cloudflare/tools/build-public.mjs && node --check cloudflare/tools/audit-public.mjs && node --check cloudflare/tools/build-private-seed.mjs && node --check cloudflare/tools/verify-deployment-config.mjs && node --check cloudflare/tools/verify-remote-secrets.mjs && node --check cloudflare/tools/deploy-production.mjs
scripts.check:worker: npm run build:field && npm run audit:field && npm run check:cloudflare-tools && npm run types:worker && npm run typecheck:worker && npm run test:worker && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.jsonc --env= --dry-run --outdir .wrangler-dry-run
scripts.release:field-gate: npm run build:field && npm run audit:field && node cloudflare/tools/build-private-seed.mjs --config cloudflare/private/release-config.json --output cloudflare/private/runtime-seed.sql --require-active && node cloudflare/tools/verify-deployment-config.mjs --release-config cloudflare/private/release-config.json --wrangler-config cloudflare/private/wrangler.production.json && npm run verify:remote-secrets && npm run types:worker && npm run typecheck:worker && npm run test:worker && node cloudflare/tools/deploy-production.mjs --dry-run
